scripts.dist: turbo run build --filter=@dev-tool-kit/desktop... && pnpm --filter @dev-tool-kit/desktop run pack
scripts.dist:dir: turbo run build --filter=@dev-tool-kit/desktop... && pnpm --filter @dev-tool-kit/desktop run pack:dir
scripts.dist:win: turbo run build --filter=@dev-tool-kit/desktop... && pnpm --filter @dev-tool-kit/desktop run pack:win
scripts.dist:mac: turbo run build --filter=@dev-tool-kit/desktop... && pnpm --filter @dev-tool-kit/desktop run pack:mac
scripts.dist:linux: turbo run build --filter=@dev-tool-kit/desktop... && pnpm --filter @dev-tool-kit/desktop run pack:linux
